heading: Google Cloud Private Service Connect Rates by Region
body:
Atlas rates for using GCP Private Service Connect vary by region:

> **Note:** The rates listed below are in addition to what Google Cloud charges
> you for each Private Service Connect endpoint you create.

| Google Cloud region              | Hourly Cost per Private Endpoint | Cost per Atlas Private Endpoint Capacity Unit |
| -------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| us-east1 South Carolina          | $0.0500                          | $0.0200                                       |
| us-east4 N. Virginia             | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| us-east5 Columbus                | $0.0500                          | $0.0400                                       |
| us-west1 Oregon                  | $0.0500                          | $0.0200                                       |
| us-west2 Los Angeles             | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| us-west3 Salt Lake City          | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| us-west4 Las Vegas               | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| us-central1 Iowa                 | $0.0500                          | $0.0200                                       |
| us-south1 Dallas                 | $0.0590                          | $0.0389                                       |
| northamerica-northeast1 Montreal | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| northamerica-northeast2 Toronto  | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| southamerica-east1 Sao Paulo     | $0.0760                          | $0.0200                                       |
| southamerica-west1 Santiago      | $0.0760                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-central2 Warsaw           | $0.0600                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-north1 Finland            | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-west1 Belgium             | $0.0500                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-west2 London              | $0.0600                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-west3 Frankfurt           | $0.0600                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-west4 Netherlands         | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-west6 Zurich              | $0.0660                          | $0.0200                                       |
| europe-west8 Milan               | $0.0585                          | $0.0387                                       |
| europe-west9 Paris               | $0.0585                          | $0.0387                                       |
| europe-west12 Turin              | $0.0600                          | $0.0400                                       |
| europe-southwest1 Madrid         | $0.0600                          | $0.0392                                       |
| austrailia-southeast1 Sydney     | $0.0680                          | $0.0200                                       |
| austrailia-southeast2 Melbourne  | $0.0680                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-east1 Taiwan                | $0.0500                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-east2 Hong Kong             | $0.0700                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-northeast1 Tokyo            | $0.0760                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-northeast2 Osaka            | $0.0760                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-northeast3 Seoul            | $0.0760                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-south1 Mumbai               | $0.0600                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-south2 Delhi                | $0.0600                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-southeast1 Singapore        | $0.0560                          | $0.0200                                       |
| asia-southeast2 Jakarta          | $0.0760                          | $0.0200                                       |
| me-west1 Tel Aviv                | $0.0550                          | $0.0376                                       |
| me-central1 Doha                 | $0.0615                          | $0.0397                                       |

> **Example:** 1 GB of data into Atlas via GCP Private Service Connect equals 1
> **Private Endpoint Capacity Unit** consumed ($0.02).
